name: ESOP Excellence
description: Extracts equity grant data and tax documents from ESOP Excellence, Israel's leading ESOP management platform.
author: OpenConnectors Contributors

tools.name: fetch_esop_grants
tools.description: Fetch all equity grants (stock options, RSUs, SARs) including grant date, vesting schedule, exercise price, and current status.

tools.name: fetch_tax_documents
tools.description: Fetch annual tax documents related to equity compensation (Section 102 election confirmations, exercise reports) for a given year.

year.description: Tax year to fetch documents for (e.g. 2025)
